details: The agent ran appropriate kubectl commands against the cluster, correctly identified the Progressing=False condition with ProgressDeadlineExceeded on the checkout deployment, accurately identified the root cause as the non-existent image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the v2 pod, and correctly explained why v1 pods continue serving (maxUnavailable=0 prevents terminating old pods until new ones are healthy). The diagnosis is complete and accurate.
